systems.name: OpenCode Gateway And Per-User Daemon Runtime
systems.description: Per-user daemon platform with Google-compatible gateway login binding.

containers.name: Gateway Runtime
containers.description: Root gateway that handles login mode selection and daemon routing.

containers.name: Identity Storage Surface
containers.description: Shared Google token storage plus global binding registry separation.

components.name: PAM Auth Handler
components.description: Authenticates Linux logins and resolves uid ownership.

components.name: Google Login Compatibility Handler
components.description: Accepts Google login only when binding exists.

components.name: Binding Registry Module
components.description: Authoritative Linux↔Google binding lookup surface under /etc/opencode/.

components.name: Shared Google OAuth Token Store
components.description: Stores managed-app token material for Gmail and Calendar.

components.name: Per-User Daemon
components.description: Target runtime reached after successful auth and binding resolution.

relationships.description: Linux PAM success routes to the matching daemon
Google login checks the binding registry before routing
Resolved binding yields the target daemon session
Token storage is separate and not authoritative for binding
